differential_diagnoses: Vitamin A deficiency (Xerophthalmic keratomalacia and optic neuropathy)
Nutritional optic neuropathy (multiple deficiencies including B12, folate, copper)
Toxic optic neuropathy (Heavy metal toxicity or drug-induced)
next_steps: Serum vitamin A (retinol) and vitamin D levels
Comprehensive metabolic panel, CBC, and nutritional workup (B12, folate, copper, zinc, thiamine)
Ophthalmology consult for specialized retinal imaging and electroretinogram (ERG)
Dietary and nutritional counseling for highly selective eating disorder
Genetic testing for mitochondrial disorders and optic atrophy genes
Initiation of high-dose vitamin supplementation and supportive care
